title: Salliche Student Militia
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Salliche Student Militia''' was a military program on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]] designed to train young people. The students learned to fly [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] during training, and could win scholarships to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] institutions. [[Ranna Gorjaye]] was once a member of the Student Militia, and earned a scholarship to the [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Raithal Academy]].

==Sources==
